body.title: Delete igor_mcp.py after one sprint cycle without regressions
body.result: igor_mcp.py deleted; Librarian is full replacement; settings.local.json updated; 2439 tests pass
body.description:
igor_mcp.py was deprecated 2026-05-08 (T-igor-mcp-deprecate). After one sprint cycle confirming no regressions with the Librarian MCP server as replacement, delete this file.

**Affected files:** TheIgors/lab/claudecode/igor_mcp.py
**Design rules:** no-sqlite
**Scope boundary:** delete igor_mcp.py only. Confirm no remaining references in ~/.claude.json or skill files before deleting.
**Test plan:** grep for igor_mcp.py references before deletion; run TheIgors test suite after to confirm clean.
